ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of customers the location can accommodate */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location offering the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., boat rental, kayak rental) */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "fee" INTEGER /* Whether a fee is required for the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the rental */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_transactions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_transactions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., boat, kayak) */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the equipment (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_equipment" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental equipment record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of equipment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_equipment_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES rental_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES rental_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., rental activity, customer behavior) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message included in the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start_date" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "session_end_date" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_recovery" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password recovery attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_recovery_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_recovery_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES security_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_updates_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)
